name: ci-flake-triage
description: Judge whether a red GitHub Actions check on a PR is a real regression or infrastructure/test-isolation flakiness safe to rerun or merge through. Reads the actual failure log, classifies against known signatures (confirmed external GitHub outage vs. random-file E2E timing flakiness vs. a deterministic same-file failure), cross-checks diff overlap with the failing area, and follows a disciplined rerun/wait/escalate protocol instead of blind reruns. Ships the ci-flake-triage skill + a /ci-triage command.
